overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring neon-lit streets, wet reflective surfaces, heavy traffic, and commercial storefronts. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing the player character navigating through intersections and sidewalks in a dense urban environment.

elevated pedestrian bridge visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide urban sidewalk at dusk, with wet reflective surfaces and neon lighting. The camera moves forward past red construction barriers and a parked pink sports car, approaching a large intersection with an elevated walkway visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level intersection with colorful overhead walkways

pedestrians gather and begin crossing the intersection alongside ego

agents.ego_description: walking through the large intersection toward the yellow crosswalk, navigating around other pedestrians

wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast multi-level intersection dominated by a colorful overhead pedestrian bridge. The camera moves through the crossing area with other pedestrians, passing beneath elevated highways while approaching the yellow-striped crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: major avenue crossing with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: dark sedan passes closely in front of the crosswalk
multiple vehicles drive through the intersection as ego crosses

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide avenue on the yellow striped crosswalk while vehicles pass nearby

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide avenue on a yellow-striped crosswalk, with heavy traffic passing by on the left. The view opens toward distant futuristic skyscrapers with neon lighting against the dusk sky, while the overhead structures fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with restaurants and shops

events.description: turns right onto narrower sidewalk with commercial storefronts
moves under overhead structure into more shadowed area with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk passing restaurants and storefronts under covered walkways

notable_agents.action: person walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: storefront with bright yellow signage displaying 'All Foods' and a cartoon character
piles of garbage bags and debris on the sidewalk near the building
row of commercial shops with various neon signs and illuminated displays

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a narrower commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts including an 'All Foods' restaurant with bright yellow signage. The environment becomes more enclosed under overhead structures, with trash bags visible on the sidewalk and pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit urban sidewalk through a sprawling multi-level intersection and into a dense commercial district. It begins by moving past red construction barriers and a parked pink sports car on a wet, reflective pavement, heading toward a massive intersection. As the camera enters the crossing, the view expands beneath elevated highways and a colorful overhead pedestrian bridge, weaving through other pedestrians toward a yellow-striped crosswalk. The scene then opens up as the camera crosses the wide avenue, leaving the overhead structures behind to reveal a vista of distant futuristic skyscrapers glowing against the dusk sky. Finally, the perspective shifts into a narrower, more enclosed commercial corridor lined with storefronts and bright yellow signage for an All Foods restaurant, passing trash bags and oncoming pedestrians.
